workloads.name: buffer-upload 1KB
workloads.description: Single upload command used to align with Dawn BufferUploadPerf WriteBuffer 1KB.
workloads.comparabilityNotes: Matched single queue write upload shape on both sides; Fawn uses deferred queue sync to avoid per-command wait inflation at tiny payload size while preserving per-upload timing normalization.

timingNormalization.note: Upload microbenchmark mode: run 500 uploads per Fawn sample, ignore first upload op, use explicit size-tuned submit cadence with deferred queue sync, and normalize to per-upload units. Doe-vs-Doe strict parity: right normalization mirrors left.

reasons: p50Percent=-108.181005 is not positive (positive means left faster)
p95Percent=-101.643435 is not positive (positive means left faster)
